timeline.title: Built Foundations in Computer Applications
timeline.description: Completed BCA while developing core skills in programming, web development, databases, and problem solving through academic and self-driven projects.

timeline.title: Backend Engineering Experience
timeline.description: Worked at Square Bits, progressing from trainee to backend engineer. Built APIs, payment integrations, and SaaS workflows in production environments.

timeline.title: Shifted to Product Thinking
timeline.description: Stepped away from routine execution to explore real-world problems, product direction, and long-term engineering focus.

timeline.title: Built S3 Library Platform
timeline.description: Designed and developed a SaaS system based on real operational issues like subscriptions, seat allocation, and workflow management.

timeline.title: Real-World Validation
timeline.description: Engaged with library operations to validate assumptions, understand user behavior, and identify gaps between software and real usage.

timeline.title: Paused and Refocused
timeline.description: Paused development after validation to strengthen fundamentals and improve future product decisions.

timeline.title: Learning IoT & Embedded Systems
timeline.description: Started hands-on work with microcontrollers, sensors, and communication systems to understand hardware-software integration.

timeline.title: Toward Software + Hardware Systems
timeline.description: Focused on combining backend systems with IoT to build practical, real-world integrated solutions.
